title: Uploader
description: The Uploader CDK provides directives and services for file upload functionality, including drag-and-drop support, file browsing, and upload management. The [axUploaderZone] directive can be applied to any element to enable drag-and-drop file uploads. The [axUploaderBrowseHandle] directive provides click-to-browse functionality when used within an uploader zone.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the [axUploaderZone] directive with the fileChange output to handle file selection.

sections.title: Zone Directive
sections.description: Demonstrates the [axUploaderZone] directive with drag-and-drop overlay and file type restrictions.

sections.title: Browse Handle
sections.description: Shows the [axUploaderBrowseHandle] directive for click-to-browse functionality.

sections.title: Service Integration
sections.description: Demonstrates programmatic usage of AXUploaderService with event handling and file management.

sections.title: Custom Overlay Template
sections.description: Shows how to use a custom template for the drag-and-drop overlay using the overlayTemplate input.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Whether multiple files can be selected.

props.name: accept
props.description: File types that are accepted for upload.

props.name: overlayTemplate
props.description: Custom template for the drag overlay. If provided, this will be used instead of the default overlay.

props.name: disableBrowse
props.description: Whether browsing files by clicking on the container is disabled.

props.name: disableDragDrop
props.description: Whether drag and drop functionality is disabled.

events.name: fileChange
events.description: Emitted when files are selected or dropped (like HTML file input). Emits an event with files property containing the selected files.

events.name: onChanged
events.description: Emitted when files are changed (added, removed, etc.). Deprecated: Use fileChange instead for simpler file input-like behavior.

events.name: onFileUploadComplete
events.description: Emitted when a single file upload is completed.

events.name: onFilesUploadComplete
events.description: Emitted when all files upload is completed.

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens the file browser dialog and processes selected files.
 * @returns Promise that resolves when files are processed
 */
browser(): Promise<void>

props.name: files
props.description: Gets the files observable for observing upload requests.

props.name: isAnyDetermined
props.description: Signal indicating if any upload has determined progress.

props.name: totalEstimateTime
props.description: Observable for total estimated upload time.

events.name: onFileUploadStart
events.description: Subject for file upload start events.

events.name: onFileUploadComplete
events.description: Subject for file upload complete events.

events.name: onFilesUploadComplete
events.description: Subject for all files upload complete events.

events.name: onFileUploadCanceled
events.description: Subject for file upload canceled events.

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens the file browser dialog and returns selected files as upload requests.
 * @param options - Configuration options for file selection
 * @returns Promise that resolves to an array of upload requests
 */
browse(options: { multiple?: boolean; accept?: string }): Promise<AXUploadRequest[]>

/**
 * Adds files to the upload queue and starts the upload process.
 * @param files - Files to add to the upload queue
 * @returns Promise that resolves to an array of upload requests
 */
add(files: FileList | File[]): Promise<AXUploadRequest[]>

/**
 * Cancels all pending and in-progress uploads.
 */
cancelAll(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Clears all completed uploads from the queue.
 */
clearAll(): void

/**
 * Removes a specific upload request from the queue.
 * @param item - The upload request to remove
 */
remove(item: AXUploadRequest): void
